title: Custom validator + validate_confirmation + virtual fields
prompt: Build a password-change flow for MyApp.Accounts.User: virtual fields :current_password and :new_password and :new_password_confirmation. The changeset should: (1) require all three, (2) validate_length new_password >= 12, (3) validate_confirmation(:new_password), (4) a custom validator that rejects new_password == current_password with a friendly error. Handle nils without crashing. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Synthesis of virtual fields + multiple validators + custom cross-field check. Hard because every piece is interlocking.
